summary: Iteration 40 - Tested Distributor Template Manager, Smart Royalty Reconciliation, and Refactored Routes. All 23 backend tests passed. All frontend UI elements verified and working correctly.

issues: Minor console warning about chart dimensions when page first loads - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality

Backend: DELETE /api/admin/distributor-templates/{id} deletes a template

Backend: PUT /api/admin/distributor-templates/{id} returns 404 for non-existent template

Backend: GET /api/label/royalties/export/pdf downloads PDF

Frontend: Admin Royalty Import page has 3 tabs (Import & Upload, Distributor Templates, Reconciliation)

Frontend: Import tab has CSV dropzone
Frontend: Import tab has import history section

Frontend: Templates tab has 'New Template' button
Frontend: Template editor modal opens with all field inputs (artist, track, platform, country, streams, revenue, period)

critical_code_review_comments: Refactored routes work correctly - admin_routes.py and label_routes.py properly registered
Distributor Template Manager CRUD operations all working (Create, Read, Update, Delete)
3 pre-seeded templates exist: CD Baby, DistroKid, RouteNote with correct column mappings
Smart Reconciliation endpoint returns comprehensive summary with duplicate_groups and discrepancy_groups
Template selector dropdown appears on Import tab with all templates
Admin endpoints properly require admin role (403 for non-admin users)
Label Dashboard correctly has ONLY export functionality - NO import section
seed_data_creation: Test templates created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 40 tested three new features: (1) Distributor Template Manager - CRUD for saving column mappings from distributors like CD Baby, DistroKid, RouteNote. Templates are stored in distributor_templates collection. (2) Smart Royalty Reconciliation - GET /api/admin/royalties/reconciliation analyzes all imported royalties for duplicate entries (same artist+track+platform+period across different imports with same revenue) and discrepancies (different revenue). (3) Refactored server.py from 3400 to 2185 lines by extracting admin routes to /app/backend/routes/admin_routes.py and label routes to /app/backend/routes/label_routes.py. Admin Royalty Import page at /admin/royalty-import now has 3 tabs: Import & Upload (with template selector), Distributor Templates (CRUD), and Reconciliation. Label Dashboard at /label has 3 tabs: Overview, Royalty Splits, Payouts (with CSV/PDF export only - NO import functionality).

mocked_apis.note: No mocked APIs. All endpoints are fully functional with real MongoDB data.

POST /api/admin/distributor-templates.returns: template object with id, name, column_mapping, notes, created_at, updated_at

GET /api/admin/distributor-templates.returns: Array of templates sorted by name

returns.duplicates: array of duplicate groups (same revenue across imports)
returns.discrepancies: array of discrepancy groups (different revenue across imports)

refactored_routes.admin_routes.py: All admin endpoints (dashboard, users, submissions, analytics, royalty import, templates, reconciliation)
refactored_routes.label_routes.py: All label endpoints (dashboard, roster, royalty splits, payout export)
refactored_routes.server.py: Refactored from 3400 to 2185 lines, registers admin_router and label_router

import_tab.import_history: Table with file, template, rows, matched, unmatched, revenue, date, details

templates_tab.template_cards: Shows all templates with column mappings

reconciliation_tab.summary_cards: Total Imports, Total Entries, Duplicate Groups, Discrepancies
reconciliation_tab.revenue_cards: Potential Duplicate Revenue, Revenue Discrepancy Total
reconciliation_tab.duplicates_table: Artist, Track, Platform, Period, Occurrences, Revenue Each, Excess
reconciliation_tab.discrepancies_table: Artist, Track, Platform, Period, Min Revenue, Max Revenue, Difference

payouts_tab.export_section: Export CSV and Export PDF buttons
payouts_tab.payout_summary: Table with Artist, Gross Revenue, Split, Artist Payout, Label Earnings

label_dashboard_ui.import_functionality: NONE - Import moved to Admin Dashboard only
